title: QA Automation Engineer
description: We are hiring a QA Automation Engineer to build and maintain end-to-end regression suites for a payroll platform. You will work closely with developers and product managers, design automated coverage for web workflows, and improve CI reliability. Strong experience with Selenium, Playwright, TypeScript, API testing, and Git is preferred. Hybrid in Vancouver.

title: Senior SDET
description: As a Senior SDET, you will own automation strategy across web and API layers, help shape CI/CD pipelines, and mentor engineers on testability. Required skills include Cypress or Playwright, REST API testing, TypeScript or JavaScript, CI/CD, and cloud environments such as AWS.

title: Software Engineer II
description: Join our product engineering team to build customer-facing features with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node, and PostgreSQL. You will collaborate across product and design, ship API integrations, and improve performance in a fast-moving SaaS environment.

title: Backend Engineer
description: We need a Backend Engineer with Node, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, and AWS experience. You will build REST APIs, improve system reliability, and support integrations across internal services. Hybrid in Toronto.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Help us scale cloud infrastructure using Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, and GitHub Actions. This DevOps Engineer role focuses on observability, CI/CD, deployment safety, and incident follow-up.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: You will troubleshoot customer issues across web applications and APIs, reproduce bugs, collaborate with engineering, and write clear issue summaries. Experience with SQL, APIs, browser debugging, and customer communication is valued.

title: Data Analyst
description: We are looking for a Data Analyst with strong SQL, dashboarding, stakeholder communication, and business reporting skills. Experience with product metrics, A/B testing, and data storytelling is a plus.

title: Technical Operations Specialist
description: Support technical operations across customer onboarding, internal tooling, workflow automation, QA verification, and documentation. Ideal candidates are detail-oriented, technical, and comfortable working with APIs, SQL, spreadsheets, and support workflows.

title: Automation Test Engineer
description: Contract Automation Test Engineer needed for regulated health software. Build and maintain Selenium and API automation, support regression planning, and improve traceability. Experience documenting defects and working in Agile environments is required.

title: Frontend Engineer
description: Frontend Engineer role focused on React, TypeScript, accessibility, performance, and design collaboration. Bonus points for Next.js, testing libraries, and experience shipping polished product UIs.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Join our SRE team to own reliability, observability, Kubernetes operations, cloud cost efficiency, and incident response. Strong AWS, Terraform, Linux, and CI/CD experience required.

title: Application Support Analyst
description: Provide first-line and second-line application support, troubleshoot payroll issues, reproduce defects, work with SQL queries, and coordinate with QA and engineering. Great fit for someone moving from QA or technical support into a stable product environment.
